chunks.title: Achan's Sin and the Defeat at Ai
chunks.reason: Narrative unit describing the cause of defeat and the immediate military loss.

chunks.title: Joshua's Lament
chunks.reason: Joshua's emotional response and prayer to God regarding the defeat.

chunks.title: God's Response and Instructions
chunks.reason: Divine oracle explaining the cause of failure and prescribing the method of judgment.

chunks.title: Identification of Achan
chunks.reason: Narrative sequence of the tribal selection process and discovery of the culprit.

chunks.title: Judgment and Resolution
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the narrative with the execution of Achan and restoration of God's favor.
